title: Update Notice: Computational Analysis of Plasma Lipidomics from Mice Fed Standard Chow and Ketogenic Diet
author: Amy L. Seufert
license_note: PMC full-text XML — Bio-protocol — CC-BY confirmed in article XML
steps_raw: After official publication in Bio-protocol ( https://bio-protocol.org/e4819 ), we would like to add the following source of funding to the Acknowledgments section of the article: “The QTOF mass spectrometer was funded by an instrument grant from the NIH: ABSciex Triple ToF 5600 NIH #1S10RR027878-01.”
